title: Dong Lin
content:
Dong Lin
 was one of the 
Celestial Clan
's 
Grand Empyreans
 and potentially their strongest. He was also the Founder of the Dong Lin Sect.

He was the only one (at least among the 
Celestial Clan
) who completely relied on his own strength to become a Grand Empyrean, cultivating essence true bodies to breakthrough instead of receiving a fortune from the Immemorial God Realm like many others.

History
[
]

He was the First Generation's Ancestor of the Dong Lin sect. Before he fell, he was known as the number one Grand Empyrean in the 
Celestial Clan
, with even the much older Grand Empyrean Jiu Di dreading him. He was also the only one to reach the 19th palace of the Empyrean Exalt trial as an Ascendant Empyrean. 

At one point in his life, he journeyed to Mount Gu Dao in the Ancient Clan's territory. The full details of what transpired are unknown, but it was stated that Dong Lin attempted to ascend the mountain (Potentially to challenge Gu Dao). Although he failed to reach the top, he still impressed Gu Dao and was acknowledged by him as the only Celestial to ever attempt the challenge.

He died sometime after this, with his body unable to be found even by other Grand Empyreans.

Trivia
[
]

He is the only 
Celestial
 to ever ascend Mount Gu dao
